channel.title: Fantasy on amcs :: creative stuff
channel.description: Recent content in Fantasy on amcs :: creative stuff

item.title: The Banana Dealer
Wings
item.description: A shadow swooped down across the night’s backdrop of many stars, stopped before him, resolved into something reptilian with ragged wings and scythe-like claws that slashed at his heart. They found him in the morning, lifeless and soulless but unmarked, claimed by death’s night-time embrace.
